issue_title: Job.__repr__ causes a RecursionError when the job is passed to the do function as an arg.
issue_body:
I wish to pass the job instance to the do function of the same job i.e. `do(some_function, job)`.  However, due to the way repr is defined for job this causes a `RecursionError`.
This is the culprit:
```python
args = [repr(x) for x in self.job_func.args]
```
